main.description: Delete a gate (unhide message) on behalf of a streamer. Requires 'hide' permission. Deletes a place.stream.chat.gate record from the streamer's repository.

gateUri.description: The AT-URI of the gate record to delete.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: The request lacks valid authentication credentials.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: The caller does not have permission to unhide messages for this streamer.

errors.name: SessionNotFound
errors.description: The streamer's OAuth session could not be found or is invalid.
